avenues.name: Reallocate to best EV

avenues.name: Pawns.app (IPRoyal)
avenues.note: Official CLI + Docker, arm64. Coexists with Honeygain/EarnApp.

avenues.name: Grass

avenues.name: Nodepay
avenues.note: Airdrop play. Headless = community Kellphy/Nodepay Docker (operator vets).

avenues.name: Gradient (Sentry)

avenues.name: CPU mining (idle compute)

avenues.name: Lolli (BTC cashback)
avenues.note: Free BTC on shopping you'd do anyway. Not income — a rebate. Zero downside.

avenues.name: Learn-to-earn (Coinbase/Binance/CMC)
avenues.note: Watch a video, pass a quiz, get $3-10 of the token. Finite but genuinely free.

avenues.name: Faucets (testnet + mainnet drips)
avenues.note: Mainnet faucets = dust. TESTNET faucets = free gas to do the airdrop-farming onchain activity = enables the Farm page.

avenues.name: RetroPGF / Gitcoin (paid for work DONE)
avenues.note: THE biggest honest thin-air lever: get PAID for the open-source dashboard/tools ALREADY built. Zero capital, work is sunk. I can DRAFT the grant + impact narrative; operator submits + holds the wallet.

avenues.name: Immunefi bug bounties (skill, $0 capital)
avenues.note: Zero-capital, pure skill. The quant/security stack + AI audit can hunt. Lottery-shaped but the tail is large.

avenues.name: Base Builder Rewards
avenues.note: THE purest auto-pay: 2 ETH/wk split across top ~100 builders by score, NO application/claim. Leaderboard updates daily. Set up once, it pays.

avenues.name: tea.xyz (stake-to-fund OSS)
avenues.note: Max Howell (Homebrew creator). Stakers back packages in dependency trees → maintainers earn. Passive once registered.

avenues.name: GitHub Sponsors
avenues.note: 0% fee. Trivial early, but it's a free button on work you already ship; compounds with reputation.

avenues.name: Gitcoin Grants (GG24+)
avenues.note: Quadratic funding = many small donors trigger matching. ~$1.8M/round across 6 domains. The dashboard is a legit public good.

avenues.name: Optimism Retro Funding
avenues.note: 8–16M OP/round, reviewed MONTHLY, paid monthly. Retroactive = reward for impact already created.

avenues.name: Base Builder Grants (retro)
avenues.note: Retroactive 1–5 ETH + weekly Builder Rewards + Base Batches accelerator. Base actively pays builders.

avenues.name: Arbitrum Trailblazer AI Grant
avenues.note: $1M Trailblazer AI program + Stylus Sprint (5M ARB) + Foundation grants $20K–150K. The AI angle fits omnione.

avenues.name: Solana Foundation + Superteam
avenues.note: Superteam microgrants are fast + small; Foundation grants milestone-based. Lots of bounties on earn.superteam.

avenues.name: Octant (Golem) public goods
avenues.note: Golem-funded epochs allocate ETH to public goods. Another shot for the dashboard as a public good.

avenues.name: Algora / Bount.ing (GitHub bounties)
avenues.note: Bounties auto-posted on GitHub issues, crypto/fiat payout. This is where AI-leverage is most direct: I write the fix.

avenues.name: Immunefi bug bounties
avenues.note: Zero-capital, pure skill. Lottery-shaped but the tail is huge. Pairs with the audit-contest skill-build.

avenues.name: Code4rena audit contests
avenues.note: $100k–$2M prize pools. No capital. Beginners earn on first valid findings. The skill compounds.

avenues.name: Sherlock + Cantina contests
avenues.note: Cantina/Sherlock run large pools continuously. Spread attempts across all three platforms.

avenues.name: ETHGlobal hackathons (online)
avenues.note: $225k+/event, online participation, 15+ partners each posting bounties. Continuity Track is new = no from-scratch requirement.

avenues.name: DoraHacks / Devfolio / Encode (online)
avenues.note: DoraHacks distributed $92M+. Devfolio/Akindo/Encode Club run dozens of online programs. Reuse one build across many.

avenues.name: AI expert work (DataAnnotation/Outlier/Mercor)
avenues.note: Honest: 'useful side income with friction' — onboarding is the hard part (weeks, inconsistent). But it's real $/hr for knowledge, zero capital. Mercor = longer expert projects.

avenues.name: Ambassador + content bounties
avenues.note: Protocols pay for quality technical writing + ambassador work. AI drafts, operator's name + judgment ship it.

avenues.name: Virtuals AI-agent launchpad (Base)
avenues.note: The bot-that-sets-up-a-coin-on-X you meant. HONEST: needs capital + a token others buy = real responsibility; ONLY legit if the agent has real output (omnione does), never a hype-shell. 17k agents, $39.5M protocol revenue, AIXBT peaked ~$500M mcap.
